metadata.title: Guess the Score
metadata.description: Predict match scores. Climb the leaderboard. Win BNB.

common.playersCount: {count} players · Points update after each match

landing.title: Guess the score.
landing.subtitle: Predict match scores on X. Climb the leaderboard. Win real money every day.

dashboard.leaderboardEmpty: Rankings fill in after the first scored match.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.emptyState: No scored predictions yet. Points appear here after the first match is scored.

wallet.connectedSub: Your prize winnings (paid in BNB) will be sent to this wallet.
wallet.connectSub: This is where your winnings get sent. Prizes are paid in crypto (BNB). No wallet needed just to play.
wallet.connectMetaMaskHint: For claims, choose MetaMask in this browser — not Scan QR. QR / WalletConnect needs your phone and this tab open at the same time.
wallet.networkWrong: Wrong network — switch to BSC Testnet
wallet.signInXToLink: Sign in with X first, then connect your wallet to link payouts.

claim.emptySub: Finish a day in the top 20 to win. Your claimable rewards will appear here.
claim.signInSub: Sign in with the X account that won on the leaderboard.
claim.claimFailed: Claim failed — check wallet network and try again
claim.claimWcHint: You connected with a QR code. For claims, use MetaMask in this same browser instead (Wallet → MetaMask). QR often fails after you confirm on your phone.
claim.claimWcBusy: Confirm on your phone, then return to this browser tab immediately and keep it open until the claim finishes.
claim.linkingWallet: Linking this MetaMask address for payouts…

predictionModal.title: Predict on X
predictionModal.replyUnder: Reply under {account}'s match post with your score. Example:
predictionModal.loadError: Could not load the match post. Try again in a moment.
predictionModal.noMatchPost: No match post found yet. {account} needs to post this fixture with both team names.

celebrationCard.saveHint: Press & hold the image to save it
celebrationCard.snapshotAlt: Your win — press and hold to save
celebrationCard.tweetWon: I just won {amount} predicting match scores on @guessthescore! ⚽🏆 Climb the leaderboard and win every day. #GuessTheScore
celebrationCard.tweetWonFallback: I just won real money predicting match scores on @guessthescore! ⚽🏆 Climb the leaderboard and win every day. #GuessTheScore

switchXAccount.title: Switch X account
switchXAccount.body: X keeps you logged in across tabs. To use a different account, open X and switch accounts there first, then come back.
